description:
Sundry is a WinGet local manifest management tool that makes it easier for you to remove manifests, make changes to them, and also aids in updating them.



## Fixes
- fix: Load manifest as plain text instead of yaml to fix incorrect order and missing comments
- fix: Fix build not adding fun.txt to packaged Sundry
## Misc
- chore(deps): Remove pyyaml which is no longer needed
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DuckDuckStudio/Sundry/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7
